results.rendered_html:
pratanu a. (nu or nvī f.)
1 Very thin or minute, delicate:  Me. 29. 
2 Very small, limited, narrow; pratanu tapasāṃ  K. 43 ;  U. 1. 20 ;  Me. 41. 
3 Slender, emaciated.
4 Insignificant, trifling.
